clusters.failureShape: An error or failure message (invalid input, failed submission, "not found", captcha required) appears visually but is not in a live region, so screen-reader users are never told the action failed.
clusters.fix: Render error messages inside a live region — role="alert" (or aria-live="assertive") — so they're announced the moment they appear, without moving focus.

clusters.failureShape: A success, result count, or calculated value update (added to cart, search results, computed total) appears without a live region, so screen-reader users aren't notified the operation succeeded or what changed.
clusters.fix: Announce non-error status changes with role="status" or aria-live="polite", including result counts and confirmation messages, so users hear the update without losing their place.
